highlights: OpenAI has unveiled GPT-5.6, now integrated into Microsoft 365 Copilot, and GPT-Live for enhanced voice AI, alongside launching GPT-Red for improved safety and a Bio Bug Bounty program.

The agentic AI landscape is rapidly evolving with SpaceXAI open-sourcing its Grok Build agent harness, Google expanding Managed Agents in Gemini API, and Oracle introducing a robust, database-native memory substrate for long-horizon enterprise agents.

New open-source models are pushing boundaries, including Thinking Machines Lab's 975B multimodal Inkling MoE and PrismML's Bonsai 27B, offering 1-bit and ternary quantized versions of Qwen3.6-27B for efficient edge device deployment.

agents.title: SPINE: Bridging the Cyber-Physical Gap with Agentic AI
agents.summary: SPINE is an agentic framework designed to debug and deploy bimanual robots with minimal expertise, improving operationalization success and reducing time-to-teleoperation for scalable Embodied AI by bridging the cyber-physical gap.

agents.title: Oracle Agent Memory as an Enterprise Memory Substrate for Long-Horizon AI Agents
agents.summary: Oracle Agent Memory provides a database-native, enterprise-grade memory substrate for long-horizon AI agents, managing task state, user preferences, and procedural knowledge, offering significant efficiency over flat-history baselines.

agents.title: ChatGPT is now a partner for your most ambitious work
agents.summary: ChatGPT Work introduces an agentic capability to take action across applications and files, enabling it to manage and complete long-horizon projects from a high-level goal into finished work.

models.title: GPT-5.6: Frontier intelligence that scales with your ambition
models.summary: GPT-5.6 is announced as a frontier intelligence model, offering increased intelligence per token, stronger performance per dollar, and enhanced capabilities for tackling complex and ambitious work.

models.title: Thinking Machines Lab Releases Inkling: A 975B-Parameter Open-Weights Multimodal MoE With 41B Active Parameters And Controllable Thinking Effort
models.summary: Thinking Machines Lab released Inkling, a 975B-parameter open-weights multimodal Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model with 41B active parameters and a 1M-token context, designed as a customizable base with controllable thinking effort.

models.title: PrismML Releases Bonsai 27B: 1-bit and Ternary Builds of Qwen3.6-27B That Run on Laptops and Phones
models.summary: PrismML unveiled Bonsai 27B, offering 1-bit and ternary quantized builds of Qwen3.6-27B, specifically optimized to run efficiently on resource-constrained devices like laptops and phones, making powerful models more accessible.

tools.title: Google Releases LiteRT.js: A JavaScript Binding of LiteRT That Runs .tflite Models in Browsers via WebGPU
tools.summary: Google launched LiteRT.js, a JavaScript binding for its LiteRT inference library, enabling direct execution of .tflite models in browsers via WebAssembly and WebGPU, offering up to 60x performance gains for on-device AI.

tools.title: SpaceXAI Open-Sources Grok Build: The Rust Agent Harness, TUI, and Tool Layer Behind Its Coding CLI
tools.summary: SpaceXAI open-sources Grok Build, a Rust-based agent harness, TUI, and tool layer, providing developers with the core infrastructure used in its powerful coding CLI for building custom AI agents.

tools.title: Harness Handbook: Making Evolving Agent Harnesses Readable,Navigable, and Editable
tools.summary: The Harness Handbook and Behavior-Guided Progressive Disclosure (BGPD) streamline the evolution of AI agent harnesses by automatically synthesizing behavior-centric representations and guiding developers to relevant source code, improving edit plan quality and reducing planner tokens.

companies.title: GPT-5.6 is now the preferred model in Microsoft 365 Copilot
companies.summary: GPT-5.6 is now the preferred model powering Microsoft 365 Copilot, delivering enhanced AI capabilities across Word, Excel, and PowerPoint for faster, higher-quality work and productivity.

companies.title: The US is advancing AI safety through state and federal action
companies.summary: OpenAI proposes a 'reverse federalism' approach, advocating for state laws to inform and build a comprehensive national framework for safe and democratic AI governance in the US.

companies.title: How Deutsche Telekom is rewiring telecommunications with AI
companies.summary: Deutsche Telekom is transforming into an AI-native telco by integrating OpenAI technologies to enhance customer service, optimize employee workflows, and innovate network operations, redefining the future of telecommunications.

learning.title: Patter SDK Guide to Building a Restaurant Booking Phone Agent with Dynamic Variables, Guardrails, Latency Dashboards, and Eval Checks
learning.summary: A guide to the Patter SDK demonstrates building a voice agent for restaurant bookings, featuring dynamic variables, guardrails, callable tools, latency dashboards, and deterministic eval checks for robust, real-world deployment.

learning.title: Building a Gin Config Controlled PyTorch Pipeline with Configurable MLP Variants, Cosine Scheduling, and Runtime Parameter Overrides
learning.summary: This guide details constructing a Gin Config-controlled PyTorch pipeline, allowing experimental variables to be managed via .gin files for configurable MLP variants, optimizers, and schedulers, enabling flexible and reproducible model training.

learning.title: How sales teams use ChatGPT Work
learning.summary: ChatGPT Work empowers sales teams to automate the creation of pipeline briefs, meeting prep packets, and forecast reviews from real work inputs, enhancing productivity and strategic planning.
